titleStmt.title: SII 28.204: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 204. (A.R. No. 359 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, west gōpuram, right of entrance.

p.hi: Raṅgadēva-mahārāyar II Śaka 1503, Vṛisha, Kuṁbha, śu. 14, Thursday, Śravishṭhā, Irregular.

summary.p: This number provides the fuller text of the inscription recorded in the south gōpuram (No. 193 above). Here we get the detail of the seventh village (Nalvēli in Eṟumbūr-paṟṟu) granted, which was missed in the text of the inscription found in the south gōpuram. Here the imprecatory verses have also been added.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ śubhamastu . svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara harihararāya vibhā
ṭan bhāṣekkuttappum rāyar kaṇṭaṉ mūvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭa ṉāṭu
koṇṭu koṇṭaWritten below the line ?ṉāṭu koṭātāṉ pūrvva dakṣiṇa paścimotara catussamudrādhipati
gajaveṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya vīrapratāpan śrīraṅgadeva mahārāyar pṛdhivi
rājyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa śakābdam 1000 5 100 3 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa vṛṣa sam
vatsarattu kumbhaṉāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu caturddamiyum guruvāsaramu peṟṟa śraviṣṭā
nakṣatrattu ṉāḷ vaṭakarai rājādhirājavaḷaṉāṭu veṇṇaiyūrṉāṭu vaḻutalampaṭṭu Ucāva
ṭi taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr svāmi cidambareśvaraṉukku Ammai civakāmacuntari Ammaikku
kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa vaiyyappa kṛṣṇappakoṇṭama ṉāyakkar kaṭṭaḷaikku vaiyyappa kṛṣṇappakkoṇṭama ṉāyakkara
yyaṉ Avarkaḷ kuṭutta taṉma cātanap paṭṭayam nammiṭa kaṭṭaḷai naivettiyam tiruviḻāvukkāka
puvanekavīraṉ paṭṭaṇaccīrmai keṅkaikoṇṭāṉ paṟṟil kumutāmūlaiyātampaṭṭu ṉāṉke
llaikkuḷpaṭṭa grāmam Iraṇṭum Aracūr paṟṟukkiḻpaṟṟu kurukuparam ṉāṉkellaikkuḷ paṭṭa
grāmam Oṉṟum teṉkarai koḻiyūṟ paṟṟu koṉūr ṉāṉkellaikkuḷ paṭṭa grāmam O
ṉṟum kāvaṉūrp paṟṟil toḻuvūr ṉāṉkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa grāmam Oṉṟum
Āka grāmam 5m citamparam miḷaku tarakum yitu nammuṭaiya Upayamākak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa
puraṭṭāti tiruviḻāvukkuvum periya tiruṉāḷ Āyirakkāl maṇṭapattil gaṇḍavasan=ta
nukkum sahasraśaṅkhābhiṣekattukkumāka Aḻicukāyilp paṟṟu keṅkai koṇṭaā
ṉ nāṉkellaikkuḷ paṭṭa grāmam Oṉṟum Eṟumpūr paṟṟu nalveli nāṉkellaikku
ḷppaṭṭa grāmam Oṉṟum Āka grāmam Eḻum tarakum vaiyyappa kṛṣṇappakoṇṭama ṉāyakkar
Ayyaṉ Avarkaḷukku puṇyamāka kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭa paṭiyiṉāle Inta grāmam Ēḻum tarakumThe scribe has missed “miḷaku” in miḷaku tarakum
candrādittyavaraiyam nammuṭaiya kaṭṭaḷaiile Anubhavittukkoḷḷa kaṭaivarkaḷ
Ākavum . § svadattāt dviguṇam puṇyam paradattānu pālanam paradattāpahā
§ § reṇa svadattanniṣphalam bhavet . Inta puṇṇiyattai yār Oruttar paripā
laṉam paṇṇinavar cuvāmiyuṭaiya civanta pātacervai cevitta palaṉ peṟavum .
Digital edition of SII 28.204 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
